suggestion.en: Your reading after this meal is high. Try reducing your starch portion (ugali, rice, or sweet potato) and adding more beans or lentils — same cost, slower glucose release.
suggestion.rw: Agaciro k'amaraso yawe nyuma y'ifunguro ni hejuru. Gerageza kugabanya igice cy'ibikomoka ku bijumba (ugali, umuceri, cyangwa ibijumba) no kongera ibishyimbo cyangwa amashaza — igiciro kimwe, amaraso azamuka buhoro.

suggestion.en: Your post-meal reading is high. Consider smaller portions and adding more vegetables to your next meal.
suggestion.rw: Agaciro k'amaraso nyuma y'ifunguro ni hejuru. Tekereza ibice bito no kongera imboga mu ifunguro ryawe rikurikira.

suggestion.en: Your post-meal reading is slightly elevated. This is a reminder to watch portion sizes, especially for starches.
suggestion.rw: Agaciro k'amaraso nyuma y'ifunguro ni hejuru buhoro. Ibi bikumbutsa kureba ingano y'ibice, cyane cyane ibikomoka ku bijumba.

suggestion.en: Your fasting reading is high. This may indicate your overnight glucose control needs attention. Please discuss with your doctor.
suggestion.rw: Agaciro k'amaraso yawe ku nzara ni hejuru. Ibi bishobora kwerekana ko ugenzura amaraso usindiye bisaba gutekereza. Vugana na muganga wawe.

suggestion.en: You've had two difficult weeks in a row. Consider reaching out to your doctor — your medication or meal plan may need adjustment.
suggestion.rw: Ufite ibyumweru bibiri bigoye ikurikirana. Tekereza kuvugana na muganga wawe — imiti yawe cyangwa gahunda y'indyo bishobora gukenera guhindurwa.

suggestion.en: Great week! Your readings are well-controlled. Keep up your current routine.
suggestion.rw: Icyumweru cyiza! Agaciro k'amaraso yawe ni cyiza. Komeza imyitwarire yawe isanzwe.
